subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was perused, and it betokened steadfastness in the Cause of God. Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق نامه شما تلاوت شد دلالت بر استقامت در امرالله داشت طوبی لک و
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
